items.title: [正面] roguelike deckbuilder but make it gacha + cthulu. ...
items.summary:
roguelike deckbuilder but make it gacha + cthulu. fun and challenging.

it's relatively f2p friendly for a free gacha game. there's plenty of pve. there's also 2 kinds of pvps. for the first kind, it would be advantageous to have more SSRs in your account. for the second kind, it's accessible to everyone. the standard banner, which the game rewards pulls for generously, is pretty good. 

80% of gameplay is easily accessible without heavy investment. however i'm guessing the hardest content might be inaccessible to most f2p. keeping up with meta relies on having to pull character and "wheel" (kinda like weapons) dupes. you can have up to 12 dupes! some content also rewards not only heavy vertical investment, but also horizontal. 

my biggest frustration rn is that levelling characters and farming high level materials is gatekept behind the player's level, but events aren't. so i can finish events 10-15 levels higher but i'm hitting a glass ceiling because my player level is too low. and getting player exp is sooooo grindy. this is the kind of game that wants you to do dailies and weeklies. 

also, i do not recommend going in blind. pve content is (i heard) difficult in later arcs, so it's important to learn teambuilding and strategically pulling on banners and characters. spending pulls on the wrong banner in early game could eff up your account.

as expected of a gacha game, there are more naked women than there are male characters. 

idc about the lore. tho i started played this game cuz i like cosmic horror, this is one of those games where i don't know if they will ever actually finish the story so getting invested in largely one-off characters seems moot. is there actual plot or is it just a set of short stories? meh

for now, i find it enjoyable. we'll see in the future if i'll continue playing.

items.title: [正面] its is a fun story and card game
items.summary: its is a fun story and card game
